title: Kismet - Optimized
description: The Official Recommended Vanilla-esque Fabric Modpack for 1.21 on the Kismet minecraft server Network
body:
## Official Reccomended Client Side ( Includes some world generation mods ) modpack for play.kismetgam.ing.

# What is this Pack?

**This Modpack is meant to be an ( Almost ) Entirely client side optimization + customization pack intended to be used on the Kismet Minecraft Servers. It Includes a couple mods that you lose some functionality without, such as voice chat and world generation mods, but these are not required for multiplayer.**

## Shader Reccomendations

For Low End PCS, It is Reccomended that you Disable shaders, as they come enabled my default.

If you have a more mid range PC and can generally handle shaders at Medium settings, I reccomend Switching to Complimentary Reimagined + Euphoria Patches, and switching to the Euphoria Patches Preset.

By Default, The Shaders Selected are Complimentary Reimagined + Euphoria Patches. I originally Chose Euphoria Patches, but raised some of the settings as my system can handle it without issue. For your own comparison I have a Ryzen 7 7700x and a rx 7800 xt.
